title: German Tomatoes Casserole
description: A malty, crumbly, nostalgic German dish featuring tomatoes, steam, and jain-friendly ingredients, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, saute the onions and tomatoes in olive oil until they are tender.
In a large bowl, combine the sauteed onions and tomatoes, malt extract, breadcrumbs, nutritional yeast, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well until all the ingredients are fully incorporated.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
